mapper.select: SELECT id, title, content, user_id, tenant_id, created_at FROM post WHERE status = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, title, content, user_id, tenant_id, created_at FROM post WHERE status = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, title, content, user_id, tenant_id, created_at FROM post WHERE status = 0 AND user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE post SET status = 2 WHERE id = #{postId} AND status = 0
